About Me

Engineering the
future of AI

I'm a B.Tech IT student at MVSR Engineering College, Hyderabad, deeply passionate about building AI systems that matter — from multimodal AI platforms to women safety ecosystems.

My work spans full-stack development, machine learning pipelines, and IoT — all tied together by a love for clean architecture and real-world impact. I've shipped production-grade AI systems, led teams under 24-hour hackathon pressure, and pitched funded startups.

Currently serving as Technical Lead at AIMERS, mentoring fellow engineers and driving AI/ML projects across the college community.

Projects

Things I've Built

Real systems. Real impact. Built under pressure and shipped with purpose.

01 · Featured
🏆 R&D Dept. Selected · MVSR
ARMOUR — Women Safety Ecosystem
AI-driven women's safety platform featuring a Flutter SOS mobile app, React.js dashboard, Python ML risk server, and IoT smart poles. Proposed ML safety-zone scoring model targeting 95%+ SOS detection accuracy with real-time threat classification. Pitched at CBIT IdeaThon and selected by MVSR R&D for funded development.
Flutter React.js Python ML IoT REST APIs FastAPI
02
MultiModAI — Triple-Model AI Platform
Architected a triple-model AI cascade (Roboflow → Llama 3.1 → Gemini 2.5 Flash) serving 5 domains. Reduced average response latency by ~40% via async API chaining.
React/Vite Flask MongoDB Roboflow Cerebras Gemini
03
🥇 1st Place · National Hackathon
EduMentor — AI Academic Assistant
Adaptive NLP learning engine adjusting study paths via AI feedback loops. Full prototype delivered in 24 hours — React frontend, FastAPI backend, AI integration.
Python FastAPI React.js NLP
04
🥈 Shortlisted & 1st Runner-Up · Microsoft
Career Orchestrator
Multi-agent workflow for adaptive career guidance with 3 specialized AI agents — skill assessment, role matching, roadmap generation — using OOP design patterns.
Python Multi-Agent AI FastAPI OOP
05
Emergency Vehicle Priority System
Real-time traffic signal override using computer vision to detect emergency vehicles. Edge-processing pipeline targeting sub-2-second detection-to-signal response.
Computer Vision IoT FastAPI Python
06
Library Management System
Browser-based library app with full CRUD operations and MongoDB persistent storage supporting 1,000+ book records with real-time availability status.
HTML/CSS/JS MongoDB
